titleStmt.title: SII 9.450: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 450. (A.R. No. 404 of 1928.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PRAKARA.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1366, Raktākshi, Pushya, śu. 5, Sō[mavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1444 December 14 Monday, in the reign of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that, when Timmaṇṇa-Oḍeya was ruling over the Bārakūra-rājya, the Nakharas and Seṭṭis of Dharmapaṭṭaṇa agreed to pay to the temple of Mahādēva a portion of toll-revenue raised in the village and use it for repairing the gold pinnacle of the temple and that the balance, if any, would be used for the service of the god and for no other purpose. The gift was made to expiate the sin commited by them in having murdered two men (named) of their community.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyayē namaḥ
śrīgurubhyō namaḥ nirvignamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁ
bicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudaya
śakavaruṣa 1366 raktākṣisaṁvatsarada puśya śu 5 sō lu
śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dē
varāyamahārāyaru vijayānagarada siṁhāsanada
li sakaḷasāṁbrājyavanāḷutiha kāladalū Avara nirū
padiṁ tiṁmaṇaOḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷutiha
sameyadalu . dharmmapaṭaṇada nakharadavaru nakharēśvarada
śrīmahādēvarige māḍida prāyaścittada kramaveṁteṁdara
hoṁneya haḍavaḷara maga Anyaṁṭṭara baḷiya tirumaha
ḍavaḷananū mādeseṭṭiya maga Atimuddana baḷiya beṁma
seṭṭiyanū dharmmapaṭṭaṇada nakharadaluḷavaru koṁdadake
paḍuvakēriya halaru seṭṭikāṟaru Ā yeraḍu kuṭuṁbada
varu kaṁḍiṁda dharmmapaṭaṇada nakharadavara kayyalū māḍi
sida prāyaścitta basaṟūralū Aramaneya suṁka kāṭiga 10
honnu huṭida kāṭiga 1 honnanū naḍasibaharu Akṣāradalu
hattu honu suṁkavādare Oṁdu hoṁna lekkadalu kāla
kālakke Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍasibaheveṁdu taṁma svarū
ciyiṁda Oḍaṁbaṭu barasida śāsana �yo honu mahādē
vara ceṁbina Oḍilu honna kaḷaśake māḍida dharma Ālliṁ
da mēlaṇa Ādāyavāda honnanu mahādēvara vinayō
gake Uḷadu matte Āva veccakū tegeyasalladeṁdu paḍu
vakēriya halaru seṭṭikāṟaru Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasida śilā
śāsana yidake dharmapaṭṭaṇada nakharadavara suhastada Oppa śrīsa
dāśiva paḍuvakēryi halaru seṭṭikāṟara suhastada Oppa na
kharēśvarada śrīmahādēvaru . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānā
śrīyōnupālanā . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁ padaṁ . vāgudattaṁ manādattaṁ dhārādattaṁ dinē dinē . śa
ṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ* .] maṁgaḷa
mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.450 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
